property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-22\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\MinGW\bin;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Server 8.0\bin;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Server 8.1\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Program Files\maven\apache-maven-3.9.12\bin;C:\Users\K Aditya\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python38\Scripts\;C:\Users\K Aditya\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python38\;C:\Users\K Aditya\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\K Aditya\Downloads\mingw-18.0-without-git.exe;C:\Users\K Aditya\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\K Aditya\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA 2025.3.2\bin;C:\Users\K Aditya\AppData\Local\Python\bin;.

testcase.name: runScenario["Add product to cart from Toys category", "Amazon Add to Cart Functionality"](1)
testcase.system-out:
Scenario Outline: Search product using multiple data # src/test/resources/features/msearch.feature:12
Scenario: Add product to cart from Toys category # src/test/resources/features/add_to_cart.feature:2 11:56:36 INFO hooks.Hooks - ========== TEST STARTED: Add product to cart from Toys category ========== 11:56:36 INFO hooks.Hooks - ========== TEST STARTED: Search product using multiple data ========== Launching browser: chrome Launching browser: chrome 11:57:04 INFO hooks.Hooks - Browser launched and URL opened | Thread: 33 11:57:04 INFO stepdefinitions.AmazonCartSteps - Amazon homepage opened ✔ Given user is on Amazon homepage # stepdefinitions.AmazonCartSteps.openAmazon() 11:57:04 INFO stepdefinitions.AmazonCartSteps - Navigating to Toys category 11:57:05 INFO hooks.Hooks - Browser launched and URL opened | Thread: 34 11:57:05 INFO stepdefinitions.AmazonSearchSteps - Amazon homepage opened ✔ Given user opens Amazon homepage # stepdefinitions.AmazonSearchSteps.openAmazon() 11:57:05 INFO stepdefinitions.AmazonSearchSteps - Entering product: iPhone ✔ When user navigates to Toys category from menu # stepdefinitions.AmazonCartSteps.navigateMenu() 11:57:30 INFO stepdefinitions.AmazonCartSteps - Selecting product ✔ And user selects a product from category page # stepdefinitions.AmazonCartSteps.selectProduct() 11:57:44 INFO stepdefinitions.AmazonCartSteps - Switching to product tab 11:57:44 INFO stepdefinitions.AmazonCartSteps - Selected Product: Wembley Hover Football for Kids| Electric Soccer Ball Floating Air| Engaging Indoor Game for Kids | Birthday Gift for Boys| Advanced & Rechargeable Hover Ball Game (Blue) 11:57:44 INFO stepdefinitions.AmazonCartSteps - Selected Price: 499 ✔ And user switches to product tab # stepdefinitions.AmazonCartSteps.switchTab() ✔ Then product page should be displayed # stepdefinitions.AmazonCartSteps.validateProductPage() ✔ When user enters "iPhone" in search bar # stepdefinitions.AmazonSearchSteps.enterSearch(java.lang.String) 11:57:47 INFO stepdefinitions.AmazonSearchSteps - Clicking first suggestion ✔ When user adds product to cart # stepdefinitions.AmazonCartSteps.addCart() ✔ And user navigates to cart page # stepdefinitions.AmazonCartSteps.openCart() 11:57:49 INFO stepdefinitions.AmazonCartSteps - Validating correct product and price Expected Name: Wembley Hover Football for Kids| Electric Soccer Ball Floating Air| Engaging Indoor Game for Kids | Birthday Gift for Boys| Advanced & Rechargeable Hover Ball Game (Blue) Actual Name: Wembley Hover Football for Kids| Electric Soccer Ball Floating Air| Engaging Indoor Game for Kids | Birthday Gift for Boys| Advanced & Rechargeable Hover Ball Game (Bl… Expected Price: 499 Actual Price: 499 Expected (30 chars): wembley hover football for kid Actual (30 chars): wembley hover football for kid ✔ Then product should be added to cart # stepdefinitions.AmazonCartSteps.validateProductAdded() 11:57:50 INFO stepdefinitions.AmazonCartSteps - Subtotal: ₹499.00 ✔ And subtotal should be displayed # stepdefinitions.AmazonCartSteps.validateSubtotal() 11:57:50 INFO stepdefinitions.AmazonCartSteps - Cart count: 1 ✔ And cart count should be updated # stepdefinitions.AmazonCartSteps.validateCartCount() 11:57:51 INFO hooks.Hooks - TEST PASSED: Add product to cart from Toys category ✔ And user clicks on first suggestion # stepdefinitions.AmazonSearchSteps.clickFirstSuggestion() 11:57:51 INFO stepdefinitions.AmazonSearchSteps - Validating results page 11:57:51 INFO hooks.Hooks - Browser closed | Thread: 33 11:57:51 INFO hooks.Hooks - ========== TEST ENDED ==========
✔ Then results page should be displayed # stepdefinitions.AmazonSearchSteps.verifyResultsPage() 11:57:52 INFO stepdefinitions.AmazonSearchSteps - Validating results for: iPhone ✔ And results should be relevant to entered product # stepdefinitions.AmazonSearchSteps.validateResults() 11:57:52 INFO hooks.Hooks - TEST PASSED: Search product using multiple data
testcase.system-err: SLF4J(W): No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details. testcase.name: runScenario["Search product using multiple data", "Amazon Search Functionality"](3)
testcase.system-out:
Scenario Outline: Search product using multiple data # src/test/resources/features/msearch.feature:14 11:57:53 INFO hooks.Hooks - ========== TEST STARTED: Search product using multiple data ========== Launching browser: chrome 11:57:56 INFO hooks.Hooks - Browser launched and URL opened | Thread: 34 11:57:56 INFO stepdefinitions.AmazonSearchSteps - Amazon homepage opened ✔ Given user opens Amazon homepage # stepdefinitions.AmazonSearchSteps.openAmazon() 11:57:56 INFO stepdefinitions.AmazonSearchSteps - Entering product: Laptop 11:57:59 INFO hooks.Hooks - Browser launched and URL opened | Thread: 33 11:57:59 INFO stepdefinitions.AmazonSearchSteps - Amazon homepage opened ✔ Given user opens Amazon homepage # stepdefinitions.AmazonSearchSteps.openAmazon() 11:57:59 INFO stepdefinitions.AmazonSearchSteps - Entering product: Samsung ✔ When user enters "Laptop" in search bar # stepdefinitions.AmazonSearchSteps.enterSearch(java.lang.String) 11:58:05 INFO stepdefinitions.AmazonSearchSteps - Clicking first suggestion ✔ When user enters "Samsung" in search bar # stepdefinitions.AmazonSearchSteps.enterSearch(java.lang.String) 11:58:06 INFO stepdefinitions.AmazonSearchSteps - Clicking first suggestion ✔ And user clicks on first suggestion # stepdefinitions.AmazonSearchSteps.clickFirstSuggestion() 11:58:11 INFO stepdefinitions.AmazonSearchSteps - Validating results page ✔ Then results page should be displayed # stepdefinitions.AmazonSearchSteps.verifyResultsPage() 11:58:11 INFO stepdefinitions.AmazonSearchSteps - Validating results for: Laptop ✔ And results should be relevant to entered product # stepdefinitions.AmazonSearchSteps.validateResults() 11:58:12 INFO hooks.Hooks - TEST PASSED: Search product using multiple data 11:58:12 INFO hooks.Hooks - Browser closed | Thread: 34 11:58:12 INFO hooks.Hooks - ========== TEST ENDED ==========
✔ And user clicks on first suggestion # stepdefinitions.AmazonSearchSteps.clickFirstSuggestion() 11:58:12 INFO stepdefinitions.AmazonSearchSteps - Validating results page
